text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking down the hallway...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All that's left to prepare for the new trainer
orientation is the handouts. That should be it for
today's work.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I almost forgot to feed Director Akikawa's
cat! But even if I head to her office now...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer?! Oh, how embarrassing for you to see me
like this!
choice_data_list: I can run to the director's office for you!
I can help you with the handouts!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much! Only if you're really sure it's
okay, though.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Her cat's been eating a lot lately. The director has
even been complaining of a sore neck from
carrying it.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So please don't give it too much food! No matter
how cute it acts!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, now that I think about it... It feels like just
yesterday I was showing you the ropes...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And look at you now! You're a truly splendid
trainer with a trainee of your own!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please provide the same support to all the new
trainers in the future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Tazuna has a lot of responsibilities
aside from being the director's secretary.
choice_data_list: Don't you think you're a little too busy?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you worried about me? Hehe... I
appreciate your concern.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But I assure you, I'm perfectly fine! I'm confident
in my physical fitness, and most importantly...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Being able to help Umamusume and their trainers
alike brings me more joy than anything else.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It's work, of course, but it's also a way of life for
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her smile, I can feel the great amount of love
Tazuna has for what she does.
